name: Ryan Dunn
title: Last known photo of Ryan Dunn, taken on June 20, 2011, at a bar hours before his fatal car crash.
description: Ryan Dunn was photographed on the night of June 20, 2011, at Barnaby's of America, a bar in West Chester, Pennsylvania, where he had been drinking with a friend. In the early morning hours, Dunn was driving his Porsche 911 GT3 on Route 322 in West Goshen Township when he lost control at an estimated 130 mph. The car jumped a guardrail, went through a wooded area, and burst into flames. Both Dunn and his passenger, Zachary Hartwell, were killed. His blood alcohol level was more than twice the legal limit. He was 34 years old. His Jackass castmate Bam Margera was devastated by the loss.
bio: Ryan Dunn was an American stunt performer, television personality, and actor best known as a member of the "Jackass" crew. His daring stunts and humor made him a fan favorite on the show.
